accounts.policy: Cold account for issuer configuration and governance actions only.
Approved issuer co-signer for high-threshold OGC issuer governance actions. Not approved as treasury, payroll, or liquidity wallet.
Cold or low-frequency account for approved OGCoin treasury activity; no routine airdrops, payroll, or liquidity operations.
Public grant disbursement account for approved open source project allocations; no issuer configuration, payroll, or liquidity operations.
Approved public distribution reserve for opt-in OGC airdrops and reviewed distribution batches. Not approved for treasury, payroll, or liquidity operations.
Public liquidity test account for policy-limited OGC/XLM market activity; must stay within approved exposure limits and public reconciliation rules.

entries.title: Distribution wallet designated
entries.summary: Designated the observed OGC reserve account as the public distribution wallet for opt-in airdrops and reviewed distribution batches.

entries.title: Interim issuer and treasury governance policy published
entries.summary: Published issuer, supply, signer, treasury, distribution, liquidity, and review guardrails for the OGC pilot period.

entries.title: Issuer home domain set
entries.summary: Set issuer home_domain to www.opengreencoin.com so wallets and explorers can discover the public SEP-1 metadata.

entries.title: Trust, risk, and governance disclosures published
entries.summary: Published public verification details, risk boundaries, governance status, liquidity readiness, and payroll limitations.

entries.title: Grant wallet designated
entries.summary: Designated the public grant wallet for approved open source project and community allocations.

entries.title: Issuer signer policy hardened
entries.summary: Added the approved personal account as issuer co-signer and updated issuer thresholds to low 1, medium 2, high 2 for stronger OGC governance.

entries.title: Liquidity policy published
entries.summary: Published OGC/XLM liquidity readiness guardrails covering wallet designation, exposure limits, pause rules, and transparency records before market activity.

entries.title: Liquidity wallet designated
entries.summary: Designated the public liquidity wallet for policy-limited OGC/XLM test activity.

entries.title: Treasury wallet designated
entries.summary: Designated the public treasury wallet for approved OGCoin reserve and program funding activity.

entries.title: Trustline onboarding guide published
entries.summary: Published wallet-specific OGC trustline setup guidance for opt-in recipients using LOBSTR, Freighter, StellarTerm, and Stellar Lab.

entries.title: Grant wallet funded
entries.summary: Activated and funded the public grant wallet with 47.4691806 XLM for approved open source project and community allocation operations.

entries.title: Grant wallet OGC trustline established
entries.summary: Established the OGC trustline for the public grant wallet so approved grant operations can receive OGC inventory after review.

entries.title: Liquidity wallet funded
entries.summary: Activated and funded the public liquidity wallet with 47.5227575 XLM for approved policy-limited OGC/XLM test activity.

entries.title: Liquidity wallet OGC trustline established
entries.summary: Established the OGC trustline for the public liquidity wallet with a 1 OGC limit for policy-limited test activity.

open_items.title: Designate treasury, grant, and liquidity wallets
Harden issuer signer policy before fixed-supply claims
Publish liquidity policy before OGC/XLM market activity

reporting_rules: Record every OGC distribution batch with date, purpose, amount, account, transaction hash, and approver.
Record every grant allocation with project name, eligibility basis, amount, account, transaction hash, and public summary.
Record every liquidity action with wallet, amount, counter asset, transaction hash, and policy reference.
Do not publish secret keys, seed phrases, private memos, payroll personal data, or private recipient information.
